other: If she has at least 1 {status:BulletGodok} and an enemy goes below -40SP or is staggered, she uses her S1 as a free follow up attack to anyone's attack (including herself).

Her S3-2 does more damage against less targets. She also loses {status:AlriuneEGOWe} at the end of the attack, so she starts at 0 afterwards, despite it doing things that would normally give her stacks.
Her evade can be used to quickly gain 10 {status:AlriuneEGOWe}.
usage: She has two separate main mechanics that work independently from each other. Her S1, S1-2, the first coin on her S2, and her permanent passive are related to Solitude, while the remaining coins on her S2, her S3, S3-2, and her activated passive are related to Faint Aroma.

Solitude: She begins the fight with 6 {status:BulletGodok} and uses 1 per Solitude related coin on her S1 and S2. She uses her S1-2 and {status:FullReload}s when running out. Her S1-2 inflicts {status:GodokPanicType} which is a panic type changing debuff that increases {keyword:Gloom} damage and applies additional {status:Sinking} count.

Faint Aroma: Her Faint Aroma related coins all inflict {status:AlriuneEGOThey}. Enemies with stacks of it take increased damage from {sinner:4} and naturally spreads more of the status around (gains more stacks when damaged by {status:Sinking}, gives stacks to other enemies on {status:VibrationExplosion}, spreads stacks to other enemies on death), but at max stacks it consumes itself to trigger {status:Sinking} damage and a {status:VibrationExplosion} on the enemy. Once her passive is active, she begins gaining {status:AlriuneEGOWe} as the debuff spreads, and at 30 consumes all of it to use her S3-2 on the enemies with the most {status:AlriuneEGOThey}.

1041401.desc:
Gain 1 [AlriuneEGOWe] if the enemy takes [Sinking] damage
Gain [AlriuneEGOWe] equal to [AlriuneEGOThey] inflicted every time enemies gain [AlriuneEGOThey]
Gain 2 [AlriuneEGOWe] every time [VibrationExplosion] is triggered regardless of the unit
1041401.name: Unwithering Flower

1041402.desc:
Always Active: Begin Encounters with 6 [BulletGodok]

At 1+ [BulletGodok], if the enemy has less than -40 SP or is Staggered at this unit or an ally's Attack End, use 'Bang. Bang.' as an Unopposed Attack (once per turn)

Attack End: At 0 [BulletGodok], use 'Stories that Never Cease' as an Unopposed Attack against the target and consume 10 SP to [FullReload]
1041402.name: A Void that Cannot be Filled

1041411.desc:
Gain 1 [AlriuneEGOWe] if the enemy takes [Sinking] damage
Gain [AlriuneEGOWe] equal to [AlriuneEGOThey] inflicted every time enemies gain [AlriuneEGOThey]
Gain 2 [AlriuneEGOWe] every time [VibrationExplosion] is triggered regardless of the unit

Attack Skill End: At 30+ [AlriuneEGOWe], use 'Magnificent End' against the target with the highest [AlriuneEGOThey] Stack

Deal +([AlriuneEGOThey] on the target)% damage against Staggered targets

If this unit lost 10%+ HP this turn, heal 3% HP and 10 SP (once per turn)
1041411.name: Unwithering Flower

1041421.desc: When the ally with the fastest Speed hits an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', inflict 2 [Vibration] and trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1 (once per turn)
1041421.name: Spring's Genesis

data.desc: [WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Vibration] + [Sinking]) on target (max 2)
data.name: Bang. Bang.
